assumption_text: The siege episode ends with the fall of Vukovar on 18 November 1991; the 20 November Ovčara executions are split out separately.
rationale: The post-fall hospital-evacuee massacre has a different victim pool and status structure than the city siege as a whole.

assumption_text: The 1991 city population of 46,735 is used as an upper-bound civilian exposure stock for the siege.
rationale: The city's civilian population was highly dynamic during the siege, but no day-by-day city-resident series was found in the open material.

assumption_text: Mixed Croatian military-and-civilian death totals are retained as context and are not redistributed into civilian or military buckets.
rationale: The project rules forbid silently allocating mixed-status deaths.
